title: crepidifolium altaicum
intro: Crepidifolium altaicum, also known as Altaic crepidium, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Crepidifolium altaicum include tea infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
